message.content:
Explore the modular apartment planner webapp thoroughly. I need to understand ALL UI-related files, their current styling, and layout structure. Focus on:

1. Find ALL CSS files (*.css, *.module.css) and read their contents
2. Find ALL UI component files in src/ui/ and read them
3. Read the main App.jsx layout component
4. Read the SvgCanvas renderer
5. Read any toolbar, sidebar, properties panel components
6. Look for any theme/color variables or design tokens already in use
7. Read index.html for any global styles or font imports

Be very thorough - read every CSS file and every UI component file completely. I need to understand the full current visual state of the app.

Perfect! Now I have completed a thorough exploration of all UI-related files. Let me compile a comprehensive report of my findings.

## Complete UI Exploration Report: Modular Apartment Planner

I have thoroughly explored all UI-related files, CSS styling, and layout structure. Here's the complete visual state and architecture:

### 1. CSS FILES AND DESIGN TOKENS

**Location: `/src/styles/`**

**variables.css** - Design system foundation:
- **Colors:**
  - `--color-background: #FFFFFF` (main bg)
  - `--color-wall-fill: #2D3748`, `--color-wall-stroke: #1A202C` (blueprint theme)
  - `--color-grid-minor: #E4E7EC`, `--color-grid-major: #CDD5DF`
  - `--color-selection: #2B7FFF`, `--color-selection-fill: rgba(43, 127, 255, 0.08)` (selection highlight)
  - `--color-text-primary: #1D2939`, `--color-text-secondary: #667085`
  - `--color-panel-bg: #F9FAFB`, `--color-panel-bg-alt: #FFFFFF` (sidebars/panels)
  - `--color-border: #D0D5DD`
  - `--color-accent: #2B7FFF`, `--color-accent-hover: #1D6FE0` (interactive blue)
  - `--color-danger: #DC2626`, `--color-danger-hover: #B91C1C` (delete/danger red)

- **Layout dimensions:**
  - `--toolbar-height: 48px`
  - `--sidebar-width: 240px`
  - `--properties-width: 280px`

- **Typography:**
  - `--font-ui: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif` (Google Fonts)
  - `--font-blueprint: 'Courier New', monospace` (for blueprint/technical labels)

- **Spacing scale:** `--space-xs: 4px`, `--space-sm: 8px`, `--space-md: 12px`, `--space-lg: 16px`, `--space-xl: 24px`

- **Border radii:** `--radius-sm: 4px`, `--radius-md: 6px`

**reset.css** - Global resets for box-sizing, buttons, inputs, lists

**global.css** - Base styles:
- Full viewport height/width on html/body/#root
- `font-size: 13px` on body
- Font smoothing enabled
- Overflow hidden (fixed layout)

### 2. LAYOUT ARCHITECTURE

**App.module.css** - CSS Grid Layout:
```
Grid Template:
┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              Toolbar (48px)                │  (.toolbar)
├──────────┬─────────────────────┬──────────┤
│          │                     │          │
│ Sidebar  │   SvgCanvas (Main)  │Properties│
│ (240px)  │     (flex grow)     │ (280px)  │
│          │                     │          │
└──────────┴─────────────────────┴──────────┘
```

- Layout uses CSS Grid with dynamic column widths controlled by inline styles `--layout-sidebar-width` and `--layout-properties-width`
- Panels can collapse to `0px` width with `.panelHidden` class
- Sidebar has `overflow-y: auto`, Properties panel has `overflow-y: auto` and `overflow-x: hidden`
- Canvas uses `min-width: 0` to prevent overflow

**File locations:**
- `/src/app/App.module.css`
- `/src/renderers/SvgCanvas.module.css`
- `/src/ui/Toolbar.module.css`
- `/src/ui/Sidebar.module.css`
- `/src/ui/PropertiesPanel.module.css`

### 3. UI COMPONENTS

#### **Toolbar** (`/src/ui/Toolbar.jsx` + `Toolbar.module.css`)
**Visual style:**
- Flex layout, 48px height
- Light gray background (`--color-panel-bg`)
- Bottom border (1px solid)
- 8px gaps between button groups, groups separated by vertical dividers

**Button styles:**
- Standard buttons: 32px height, 12px font, padding `0 12px`, border-radius 4px
- Icon buttons: 32px x 32px, no padding
- Hover: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)` background
- Disabled: 45% opacity, not-allowed cursor
- Active state: `--color-accent` background, white text
- Toggle buttons: 60% opacity by default, 100% opacity when active with background

**Icon rendering:** Custom SVG icons (16x16px) in groups:
1. File ops: New, Undo, Redo, Save, Load
2. View modes: Plan, Front, Left, Right, Section
3. Edit tools: Select, Dimension, Wall, Beam, Stair, Section, Slab, Room, Door, Window, Column
4. Toggles + Auto-detect: Sidebar, Properties, Grid, Snap toggles, Auto-detect Rooms button

**Dirty indicator:** 8px circular badge on Save button when unsaved

#### **Sidebar** (`/src/ui/Sidebar.jsx` + `Sidebar.module.css`)
**Visual style:**
- Light gray background (`--color-panel-bg`)
- Right border (1px solid)
- 12px padding
- Vertical flexbox with 12px gaps between sections
- Scrollable

**Section component:**
- Collapsible header with chevron (rotates on collapse)
- Title: 11px uppercase, 600 weight, 0.5px letter-spacing
- Chevron animates with `transform: rotate(-90deg)` when collapsed
- Count badge right-aligned

**List items:**
- 12px font, padding `4px 8px`
- Light hover: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)`
- Selected: blue background `rgba(43, 127, 255, 0.1)`, blue text

**Sections:** Project name input, Floors, Slab, Walls, Annotations, Beams, Stairs, Doors, Windows, Columns, Rooms

#### **Properties Panel** (`/src/ui/PropertiesPanel.jsx` + `PropertiesPanel.module.css`)
**Visual style:**
- Light gray background
- Left border (1px solid)
- 12px padding
- Vertical scrolling
- 12px gaps between sections

**Unit toggle:**
- Flex row at top: "Units:" label + mm/m buttons
- Unit buttons: 24px height, 11px font, 600 weight, white border

**Titles:** 14px, 600 weight
**Subtitles:** 11px uppercase, 600 weight, letter-spacing 0.5px, secondary gray text

**Color picker field:**
- Flex row with label (80px), color input (36x28px), color value text (12px)
- Color swatch: white border, 4px border-radius

**Delete button:**
- 32px height, padding `0 16px`
- Danger red background
- White text, 600 weight
- Margin-top 16px

**Input field component:**
- Label (80px flex basis), input with 28px height
- Input styling: white bg when editable, light gray when read-only
- Suffix text right-aligned (11px)
- 8px gap between label and input
- 8px bottom margin

**Properties shown:** Dependent on selection type (Wall, Door, Window, Room, Beam, Slab, Stair, Column, Annotation, SectionCut, AnnotationSettings, ProjectSummary)

#### **Modal** (`/src/ui/Modal.jsx`)
**Visual style:**
- Fixed overlay: black 40% opacity backdrop
- Modal box: white background, 6px border-radius, 24px padding
- Min-width 360px, max-width 480px
- Box shadow: `0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)`
- Title: 16px, 600 weight, 16px bottom margin
- Z-index 1000
- Escape key closes, click outside overlay closes

**Used for:** Load project dialog showing project list with Load/Delete buttons

#### **InputField** (`/src/ui/InputField.jsx`)
**Props:** `label`, `value`, `onChange`, `type`, `suffix`, `readOnly`, `step`

**Visual style:**
- Flex row: label (80px flex-basis) + input wrapper
- Input: 28px height, 8px horizontal padding, 1px border, 4px radius
- Background: white (editable) or `--color-panel-bg` (read-only)
- Text color: primary (editable) or secondary (read-only)
- Suffix text: 11px, secondary gray, right of input
- 8px margin-bottom

### 4. SvgCanvas Renderer (`/src/renderers/SvgCanvas.jsx` + `SvgCanvas.module.css`)

**Container styling:**
- Full width/height, overflow hidden, position relative
- White background

**SVG rendering:**
- Full viewport dimensions
- Transform: `translate(panX, panY) scale(zoom)`
- Default zoom: 0.1 (10%)
- Zoom bounds: MIN_ZOOM to MAX_ZOOM
- Zoom centered on cursor position

**Z-order layers in SVG:**
1. Grid (GridRenderer) - optional
2. Grid background pattern - optional
3. Slab (SlabRenderer)
4. Rooms (RoomRenderer)
5. Room preview
6. Walls (WallRenderer)
7. Beams (BeamRenderer)
8. Stairs (StairRenderer)
9. Columns (ColumnRenderer)
10. Doors (DoorRenderer)
11. Windows (WindowRenderer)
12. Section cuts (SectionCutRenderer)
13. Dimensions/annotations (AnnotationRenderer)
14. Selection overlay (SelectionOverlay)
15. Various previews (DimensionPreview, WallPreview, etc.)

**Status bar (bottom-left):**
- 24px height, light gray background
- Flex row with 16px gaps
- 11px font, secondary gray text, monospace font
- Shows: X/Y coords (mm), Zoom %, View mode, Active tool
- Status message (right-aligned, blue accent text)
- Display duration: 2.5 seconds

**Interaction modes:**
- Middle-mouse or Space+Left-click: Pan canvas
- Mouse wheel (with Ctrl): Zoom
- Tool shortcuts: V=Select, W=Wall, D=Door, N=Window, Q=Section, S=Slab, M=Dimension, B=Beam, T=Stair, R=Room, C=Column
- Escape: Cancel tool/deselect
- Delete: Remove selected object

**Cursor handling:**
- Grab cursor when panning (space held)
- Tool-specific cursor from active tool handler

### 5. FONT AND TYPOGRAPHY

**index.html** imports:
- Google Fonts: `Inter` (weights 400, 500, 600) via `https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap`
- Fallback to system fonts and sans-serif

**Typography scale:**
- Base: 13px (body)
- Small: 11px (section titles, suffixes, captions)
- Medium: 12px (buttons, labels, inputs, list items)
- Large: 14px (section titles)
- XL: 16px (modal titles)
- XXL: Never specified, defaults to browser

### 6. CURRENT COLOR APPLICATION

**Palette used:**
- Primary interactive: Blue `#2B7FFF` (accent), `#1D6FE0` (hover)
- Danger actions: Red `#DC2626` (normal), `#B91C1C` (hover)
- Text hierarchy: Primary `#1D2939`, Secondary `#667085`
- Panels: `#F9FAFB` (light gray), `#FFFFFF` (white)
- Borders: `#D0D5DD` (light gray)
- Blueprint elements: Dark gray `#2D3748` (fill), `#1A202C` (stroke)
- Grid: `#E4E7EC` (minor), `#CDD5DF` (major)
- Selection: Blue `#2B7FFF` with light blue fill `rgba(43, 127, 255, 0.08)`

### 7. KEY STRUCTURAL INSIGHTS

**Layout behavior:**
- Responsive sidebar/properties collapse via CSS Grid with dynamic column width variables
- Main canvas expands to fill space with `flex: 1`
- All panels auto-scroll independently
- No fixed widths on main content area

**Styling approach:**
- CSS Modules for component scoping (prevents conflicts)
- CSS variables for theming/dynamic values
- Inline styles for dynamic values and temporary states (modals, dialogs)
- No external UI library (custom components)

**Interactive patterns:**
- Tool-based architecture (each tool has handlers)
- Selection model (selectedId + selectedType)
- Context-based state (ProjectProvider, EditorProvider)
- Status messages appear for 2.5 seconds then auto-clear

**Accessibility hints:**
- Title attributes on toolbar buttons
- aria-label on icon buttons
- aria-expanded on collapsible sections
- Semantic button/input elements with proper labels

All file paths are absolute:
- `/src/styles/variables.css`
- `/src/styles/reset.css`
- `/src/styles/global.css`
- `/src/app/App.module.css`
- `/src/renderers/SvgCanvas.module.css`
- `/src/ui/Toolbar.jsx` & `Toolbar.module.css`
- `/src/ui/Sidebar.jsx` & `Sidebar.module.css`
- `/src/ui/PropertiesPanel.jsx` & `PropertiesPanel.module.css`
- `/src/ui/Modal.jsx`
- `/src/ui/InputField.jsx`
- `/src/app/App.jsx`
- `/src/renderers/SvgCanvas.jsx`
- `/index.html`
